text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Camps * Former Foster Children 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Families/Friends of People With Cancer Former Foster Children Foster Children Muscular Dystrophy Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Oregon adoptive and assisted guardianship families with a schedule of support groups, parenting classes, and educational events 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: ODHS adoptive and assisted guardianship families, or families who have adopted through any state foster care system Hours: Varies by training course Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS
